dashboard.heading: Loan Home / Eligibility Overview
dashboard.borrow_limit_desc: As a cooperative member, you qualify to borrow up to double (2x) the amount of your total confirmed savings.
dashboard.grace_period_hint: Grace period: 1 week after due date before overdue penalty kicks in.

apply.title: Apply for a Loan
apply.guarantor_selection: Apply for Loan - Step 2: Guarantor Selection
apply.guarantor_hint: Guarantor must be a registered and active member of the cooperative.
apply.collateral_selection: Apply for Loan - Step 2: Collateral Details (Non-Member)
apply.submitted_desc: Your loan request is undergoing review by the cooperative credit committee. You will be notified once approved.
apply.approved_desc: Your loan has been approved. The disbursement team is processing the payment offline to your nominated bank account.
